title: Refactor cleanup_protect_request label and error paths for persistence errors
description: Update the cleanup_protect_request goto label in oscore_protect_request to distinguish NVM errors from other failures. Ensure sensitive data wipe happens but SSN state is correctly managed on persistence failure. Reference oscore.c:1524+ and recent security hardening.
close_reason: Decomposed into subtasks project-LICHEN-ow3c.1.3.1-.4 for incremental implementation of NVM error distinction and SSN management in cleanup paths
